title: 16S Metagenomic Sequencing Library Preparation (Modified version of Illumina)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"354u9","text":"Metagenomic studies are commonly performed by analyzing the prokaryotic 16S ribosomal RNA (16S rRNA) gene. This protocol describes a workflow for preparing samples for sequencing the V3-V4 regions of the 16S rRNA gene.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
